image-only_correct.q:
[img]
Find the point that is closest to the camera:
A. Point A is closest
B. Point B is closest
C. Point C is closest
D. Point D is closest

image-only_wrong.q:
[img]
To scrape the scraper, which point is most suitable?
A. Point A
B. Point B
C. Point C
D. Point D
image-only_wrong.raw: To scrape the scraper, the most suitable point is A.

image&video_correct.q:
[vid]
What would likely happen if a softer object, like a rubber block, was used instead of the stone?
A. The rubber block would break
B. The person would be hurt
C. The rubber would absorb the impact
D. The nails would break
image&video_correct.raw: C. The rubber would absorb the impact

image&video_wrong.q:
[vid]
What phenomenon is observed in the video?
A. Candle producing a bright light
B. Candle flame dancing hypnotically
C. Candle burning with a weak flame
D. Candle melting into a unique shape
image&video_wrong.raw: A. Candle producing a bright light
